 # @claude-flow/testing
 
-Comprehensive testing framework for V3 Claude-Flow modules. Implements London School TDD patterns with behavior verification, shared fixtures, and mock services.

+
+> Comprehensive testing framework for V3 Claude-Flow modules. Implements London School TDD patterns with behavior verification, shared fixtures, and mock services.
 
 Based on ADR-008 (Vitest over Jest).
